reviews.comment:
La peor atención, cantidad de playeros y ni atendien. Contraten gente que quiera trabajar

(Translated by Google)
The worst service, tons of staff and they don't even help you. Hire people who actually want to work

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención en el Restaurante y en el ACA. Excelente la atención de Silvia, muy amable.

The service at the restaurant and the ACA was excellent. Silvia was particularly helpful and very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Pasamos el sábado 3/8 y las chicas que nos atendieron unas genias. Nos dieron apoyo sobre la ruta. La atención muy buena y el restaurante toene unas empanadas riquísimas

(Translated by Google)
We spent time there on Saturday, August 3rd, and the girls who served us were fantastic. They gave us great advice about the route. The service was excellent, and the restaurant has delicious empanadas.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer una parada. Muy buena la comida del restaurante y la atención del personal. Destaco la amabilidad en la atención y predisposición de la Srta Silvia en la parte del mercado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop. The restaurant food was very good, as was the staff's service. I especially want to highlight the friendliness and helpfulness of Ms. Silvia in the market area.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños.
La atención muy buena.
El bufete muy caro. Como todas las estaciones de servicio.
Medio kg de yerba $ 5000.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean.
The service was very good.
The buffet was very expensive, like all gas stations.
Half a kilo of yerba mate cost $5000.
